name: property managers managing 5–15 rental units tool
description: For property managers managing 5–15 rental units, inefficient tenant vetting causes delays in occupancy. We automate the tenant finding and vetting process instead of manual tenant screening processes.
problem_solved: Difficulty in efficiently finding and vetting tenants

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in efficiently finding and vetting tenants
